style_bible.visual_style: High-contrast cinematic with warm reddish hues emphasizing the Martian landscape; realistic textures with subtle lens flares and dust particles in the atmosphere.
style_bible.camera_rules: Use wide establishing shots to showcase vastness, smooth tracking shots for movement, and close-ups for emotional impact; avoid rapid cuts; maintain consistent color grading.
style_bible.continuity_rules: Maintain consistent lighting direction and time of day across scenes; ensure character and equipment placement continuity; preserve narrative flow with logical spatial transitions.

scenes.prompt: Wide establishing shot of the barren Martian surface at dawn, red dust swirling gently, distant rocky formations under a hazy orange sky.
scenes.camera: Slow pan from left to right revealing the vast landscape.
scenes.audio_cue: Soft wind blowing with faint mechanical hum in the background.

scenes.prompt: Medium shot of a rugged Mars rover navigating rocky terrain, dust kicking up behind its wheels, with a human silhouette visible inside the cockpit.
scenes.camera: Tracking shot following the rover from the side at ground level.
scenes.audio_cue: Mechanical engine sounds mixed with crunching gravel.

scenes.prompt: Close-up of astronaut’s gloved hand pressing buttons on a control panel inside the rover, illuminated by red emergency lights.
scenes.camera: Static close-up focusing on hand movements and illuminated buttons.
scenes.audio_cue: Beeping of control panel and faint breathing through helmet.

scenes.prompt: Wide shot of a crashed Mars lander partially buried in red dust near a cliff edge, with smoke rising from its damaged hull.
scenes.camera: Slow zoom in from a high angle to emphasize damage and isolation.
scenes.audio_cue: Crackling of damaged electronics and distant wind gusts.

scenes.prompt: Medium shot of an astronaut in a red spacesuit stepping cautiously out of the rover, dust swirling with each step.
scenes.camera: Tracking shot moving backward as astronaut walks forward.
scenes.audio_cue: Heavy breathing and soft footsteps on gravel.

scenes.prompt: Close-up of astronaut’s helmet visor reflecting the crashed lander and rocky terrain, with subtle scratches on the visor surface.
scenes.camera: Static close-up focusing on visor reflection and facial expression.
scenes.audio_cue: Heartbeat sound mixed with distant wind.

scenes.prompt: Wide shot of a drone launching from the rover, ascending into the dusty orange sky with Mars landscape below.
scenes.camera: Tracking shot following drone ascent from ground level to sky.
scenes.audio_cue: Whirring drone motors and rising wind sounds.

scenes.prompt: Medium shot of astronaut using a handheld scanner, green holographic interface glowing against the red dust background.
scenes.camera: Over-the-shoulder shot focusing on scanner and interface details.
scenes.audio_cue: Electronic beeps and soft static interference.

scenes.prompt: Wide shot of the astronaut and rover silhouetted against a Martian sunset, casting long shadows over the rugged terrain.
scenes.camera: Slow dolly out to reveal expansive horizon and fading light.
scenes.audio_cue: Ambient wind with subtle orchestral swell.

scenes.prompt: Close-up of astronaut’s helmet as a communication light blinks green, signaling successful contact.
scenes.camera: Tight close-up with shallow depth of field on helmet and blinking light.
scenes.audio_cue: Clear electronic beep followed by faint voice transmission.
